zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalene Hilton於1671年4月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克時，她的父親Mainwaring Hilton25歲，母親Mary Moulton20歲。她於大約1690年與Nathaniel Adams結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1725年2月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalene Hilton于1671年4月出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克时，她的父亲Mainwaring Hilton25岁，母亲Mary Moulton20岁。她于大约1690年与Nathaniel Adams结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1725年2月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Magdalene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalene Hilton was born in April 1671, in York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Mainwaring Hilton, was 25 and her mother, Mary Moulton, was 20. She married Nathaniel Adams about 1690. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 February 1725, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalene Hilton est née en avril 1671, à York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Mainwaring Hilton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Moulton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Adams environ 1690. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1725, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalene Hilton im April 1671 in York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mainwaring Hilton 25 und ihre Mutter Mary Moulton 20. Sie hat um 1690 Nathaniel Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1725 im Alter von 53 Jahren in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Hilton è nata il nel aprile 1671 nel York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Mainwaring Hilton, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mary Moulton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Nathaniel Adams circa 1690. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 febbraio 1725, nel York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Magdalene Hiltonが1671年4月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークで生まれた時，父Mainwaring Hiltonは25歳，母Mary Moultonは20歳であった。約1690年にNathaniel Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1725年2月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Hilton(이)가 1671년 4월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mainwaring Hilton(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Moulton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1690년 Nathaniel Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1725년 2월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Hilton nasceu em abril de 1671, em York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Mainwaring Hilton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Moulton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Adams aproximadamente 1690. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1725, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalene Hilton родилась апрель 1671 г. в местности ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Mainwaring Hilton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Moulton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Adams около 1690 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 февраля 1725 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magdalene Hilton nació en abril de 1671, en York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Mainwaring Hilton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Moulton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Adams aproximadamente 1690. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1725, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años.
